rules.name: Follow PWA Best Practices
rules.prompt: Ensure this file adheres to PWA best practices as outlined in the project prompt.

rules.name: Brand Guidelines Compliance
rules.prompt: Verify that this file follows the Beernerd.io brand guidelines, including color scheme and typography.

rules.name: Accessibility and SEO
rules.prompt: Check that this HTML file includes proper semantic structure, ARIA attributes where necessary, and appropriate meta tags for SEO.

rules.name: JavaScript Best Practices
rules.prompt: Ensure this JavaScript file uses ES6+ features, implements proper error handling, and is well-documented.

rules.name: CSS Optimization
rules.prompt: Verify that this CSS file follows a mobile-first approach and uses efficient, well-organized styles.
